penalties.description: This appears to be an instructional video showing task setup and technique demonstration rather than a timed performance. No actual task completion is observable.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as an instructional video showing task demonstrations rather than a scoreable performance attempt. GPT-4o appears to have misinterpreted the educational content as an actual task performance. The video shows setup and demonstration phases but no actual timed completion of the ligating loop task.

disagreements.rationale: Since this is an instructional video with no actual task performance, the standard practice is to assign maximum time for incomplete tasks per FLS scoring protocol.

claude_value.description: This appears to be an instructional video showing task setup and technique demonstration rather than a timed performance. No actual task completion is observable.

gpt_value.description: The final loop is positioned slightly distal to the target mark.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment that this is instructional content rather than a performance attempt is more consistent with the video description showing educational demonstrations across multiple FLS tasks.
If this is instructional content showing setup rather than performance, only introductory phases would be visible, not completion phases.
Incomplete tasks receive zero score per FLS protocol, regardless of any observed technique elements in instructional content.
